reply.text: Would you rather outrun your ex or run straight into more trouble

messages.text: bold of you to assume i run from exes
so you’re choosing the run into trouble route
treadmill already on level toxic, keep up
i saw the earbuds, you ignore drama in hd
noise canceling for men who type like you
crazy, my cardio includes chasing red flags
perfect, i sprint and emotionally distance
you love the sound of you 👀
you monitoring bpm or bad decisions per minute
both, this machine tracks delusion too
figures, screen probably flashed “here comes ryan”
nah it said “new side quest: overconfident man”
accept quest, rewards include questionable life choices
already get those free with your messages babe
you are trying me, keep going
